title: distictis buccinatoria
intro: Distictis buccinatoria, also known as the "Pig Face" or "Mouche Plant," is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Distictis buccinatoria include its potential to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Distictis buccinatoria are typically made by infusing the leaves or flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
